name: 47 - Wf Telegram Inbound Polling getUpdates TEST ONLY - TEMPLATE

parameters.content:
TEMPLATE ONLY — active=false. HARDENED PREP (no schedule).

Manual getUpdates only. Token/chat ONLY in n8n UI.

Placeholders (never real values in Git):
- __CONFIGURE_TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN_IN_N8N_UI_OR_CREDENTIAL__
- **CONFIGURE_ALLOWED_CHAT_ID_IN_N8N_UI** (defaults CLOSED until replaced)
- **CONFIGURE_OFFSET_STORE_IN_N8N_UI**
- **CONFIGURE_DECISION_STATE_STORE_IN_N8N_UI**

Guards: allowed_chat_not_configured | stale_old_update_id | duplicate_or_double_click | stale_or_unknown_decision_id

Open decisions TEST ONLY: D-9998-T

deleteWebhook = separate runtime gate.

OFFSET STORE — **CONFIGURE_OFFSET_STORE_IN_N8N_UI**
Demo: staticData lastUpdateId + lastHandledUpdateId + handledKeys.
No production Data Table id in Git.
